title: <div>My father sired six children. Three of them girls and three of them are boy
content: My father sired six children. Three of them girls and three of them are boys. The first one daughter he left behind with another woman. The second born daughter, not the second born child, was named Brittany. My father said he’d never leave again. 18 years later, he left us behind. 15 years later I’m dropping off goods and Cash had a secret condo on a street named Brittany. His favorite daughter.
context: From document: My father sired six children. Three of them girls and three of them…
